data.title: CZ posted a BNB Card related tweet on Binance Square and retweeted the Binance ALPHA listing announcement
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted a message on Binance Square saying "Welcome to BNB Chain", with pictures of BNB Card, and forwarded the ALPHA listing announcement.
According to GMGN market data, the meme coin of the same name, BNB Card, rose by more than 150%, and its market value once exceeded 20 million US dollars, and is now reported at 18 million US dollars. The 24-hour trading volume reached 18.5 million US dollars.
Meme coin transactions fluctuate greatly, relying mostly on market sentiment and concept hype, and have no actual value or use cases. Investors need to pay attention to risks.

data.title: Pump.fun Expands DeFi Offerings with the Launch of PumpSwap DEX
data.description:
TL;DR PumpSwap Launch: Pump.fun launches its native DEX on Solana, eliminating a 6 SOL migration fee to boost liquidity and challenge established platforms like Raydium. Efficient Trading: The DEX uses a Constant Product AMM model and a competitive fee structure (0.25% total) to provide smooth, low-cost, decentralized trades. Broader Vision: By adding diverse token support ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/pump-fun-expands-defi-offerings-with-the-launch-of-pumpswap-dex/

data.title: Fed's Williams Predicts Slower GDP Growth in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Williams has indicated that the GDP growth rate is expected to slow down this year compared to 2024. He noted that there are no signs of inflation expectations becoming unstable. Data suggests that the public believes the recent rise in inflation will subside.

data.title: Binance Completes Aptos Network USDC Integration
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance has completed the integration of USDC on the Aptos network and is now open for deposits. The withdrawal function will be opened after sufficient deposits are made and no further notice will be given. USDC is an electronic currency token issued by Circle Internet Financial Europe SAS. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Russia's Central Bank Governor Nabiullina: We consider cryptocurrencies to be an unstable instrument
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Elvira Nabiullina, the governor of the Russian Central Bank, said that the Russian Central Bank considers cryptocurrency to be an unstable financial instrument. She reiterated Russia's concerns about the risks of crypto assets, pointing out that they are highly volatile and difficult to be widely adopted as a means of payment or storage. (Reuters)

data.title: Russian Central Bank Views Cryptocurrency as Volatile Tool
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Governor of the Russian Central Bank, Elvira Nabiullina, stated that cryptocurrencies are considered volatile instruments. This perspective highlights the ongoing caution among financial authorities regarding the stability and reliability of digital currencies in the financial market.

data.title: Bitwise urges Strategy to lend Bitcoin to strengthen revenue and reduce liquidity risk
data.description:
Digital assets firm Bitwise Europe has advised Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) to lend out its Bitcoin to boost its recurring revenue. In a new report that examined the risks of Strategy’s stash to Bitcoin, the firm noted that Strategy’s BTC acquisition is not a risk to the Bitcoin ecosystem. According to Bitwise Europe (formerly ETC Group), […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitwise-strategy-bitcoin-strengthen-revenue/

data.title: Dubai Plans Major Regulatory Reforms to Attract Hedge Funds
data.description:
According to PANews, the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) is considering significant regulatory changes to enhance the city's appeal to hedge funds. These changes, which could be the most substantial in nearly two decades, are expected to be implemented as early as 2026.

The proposed reforms include lowering capital thresholds, reducing emergency fund requirements, and eliminating the need for regulatory approval for executive appointments. Currently, Dubai hosts over 70 hedge funds, most managing assets exceeding $1 billion. The reforms aim to impact DFSA's Category 3 license holders by reducing the minimum capital requirement to $140,000 and lowering it further to $40,000 for small local funds, thereby easing the establishment of new funds.

Additionally, positions such as compliance officers and financial officers could be appointed by companies without prior regulatory approval, streamlining operations for hedge funds in Dubai.

data.title: Canary Capital Files for First-Ever Pengu ETF—Will SEC Approve?
data.description:
Canary Capital has officially filed for the first-ever PENGU exchange-traded fund (ETF) with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The filing has driven a surge in PENGU’s price, pushing the token past key resistance levels..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/canary-capital-files-for-first-ever-pengu-etf-will-sec-approve/
